hooks.command:
python -c "
import json
from llm_brain import Brain
brain = Brain(vector_dimensions=128)
memories = brain.recall_important(top_k=5)
ctx = ''
if memories:
    ctx = 'LLM-Brain loaded memories:\n'
    for m in memories:
        ctx += f'  - [{m.tier.value}] {m.raw_text}\n'
else:
    ctx = 'LLM-Brain connected (no prior memories)'
brain.close()
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': ctx}}))
"
